user.title: Connect to Pantry Raider
user.description: Point this at your Pantry Raider install. Leave the API key blank to pair from the kitchen screen instead of copying a key by hand.

data.api_key: API key (leave blank if your install has no password)

zeroconf_confirm.title: Add this Pantry Raider install?
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant found {name} on your network. Add it now and, if it uses a password, you will be sent to approve pairing on the kitchen screen.

pair.title: Approve on your kitchen
pair.description: Pantry Raider is showing pairing code {code}. Approve the request on the kitchen screen (or in Settings, Devices), then press Submit here.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Pantry Raider at that address. Check the host and port, and that you used the LAN address.
error.invalid_auth: Pantry Raider rejected the API key. Copy it from Settings, Security.
error.pairing_pending: Not approved yet. Approve it on the kitchen, then try again.
error.pairing_unavailable: Pairing is unavailable on this install (it may be turned off in Settings, Security & Access). Paste an API key instead.

abort.already_configured: This Pantry Raider install is already set up.
abort.pairing_denied: The pairing request was denied on the kitchen.
abort.pairing_expired: The pairing request expired. Start again and approve it within a few minutes.

init.title: Pantry Raider options
init.description: How often Home Assistant checks Pantry Raider for updates, and whether Pantry Raider is given a link back to Home Assistant for cameras and Stream Deck keys.

data.connect_back: Let Pantry Raider connect back to Home Assistant
